claim_boundary: Founder target and admission contract, not a claim that the current runtime satisfies it.

human_outcomes.statement: The user can invoke, direct, interrupt, and understand Archie while their hands and eyes are occupied.
Authorized work can continue, survive suspension, and return at the right moment without requiring one foreground window to remain open.
Archie can react to explicitly subscribed events and surface relevant changes under a user-governed interruption policy.
With explicit consent, Archie can ground decisions in the screen, files, connected tools, documents, images, audio, and live system state relevant to the objective.
The user can inspect plans, evidence, artifacts, permissions, receipts, uncertainty, and unfinished obligations at the level appropriate to the work.
Continuity, identity, permissions, and run state can move across admitted devices without creating an ambient surveillance or hidden-authority channel.
Core interaction and admitted local-model operation remain useful on ordinary hardware without requiring a frontier API key.
